tuning: E A D G B E
content:
We Built This City
Starship

This is a simple and simply awesome song. All chords are power chords if you don't 
know what a 5 chord is. You can easily figure out the patterns by listening to the 
song once or twice. Enjoy =)

Intro no Chords
WE built this city,
We built this city on rock and roll x2
[ch]F5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch] 
[tab][ch]F5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch] [ch]F5[/ch]
Verse 1 [/tab]

Say you don't know me, or recognize my face
[tab]                                                                         [ch]F5[/ch] 
Say you don't care who goes to that kind of place[/tab]
Knee deep in the hoopla, sinking in your fight
[tab]                                                         [ch]F5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]
Too many runaways eating up the night[/tab]
Chorus
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                                [ch]F5[/ch]
Marconi plays the Mamba,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F5[/ch]                      [ch]E5[/ch]
Listen to the radio[/tab]
Don't you remember?
We built this city 
We built this city on rock and roll!
[tab]     [ch]A5[/ch]    [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]          [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]               [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A5[/ch]     [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]        [ch]G5[/ch]   [ch]F5[/ch]    [ch]Bb5[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[ch]F5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
[tab][ch]F5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch] [ch]F5[/ch]
Verse 2[/tab]

Someone always playing corporation games
[tab]                                                                             [ch]F5[/ch]
Who cares they're always changing corporation names[/tab]
We just want to dance here, someone stole the stage
[tab]          [ch]F5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]
They call us irresponsible, write us off the page[/tab]

 Bridge

[tab]These are notes played through this bridge : [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
It's just another Sunday, in a tired old street[/tab]
Police have got the choke hold,ohhhhh and we just lost the beat

Verse 3
[tab][ch]F5[/ch] 
Who counts the money ,underneath the bar[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb5[/ch]                              [ch]C5[/ch]
Who rides the wrecking ball into our guitars[/tab]
[tab][ch]F5[/ch]
Don't tell us you need us, 'cause we're the ship of fools[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb5[/ch]            [ch]C5[/ch]       [ch]F5[/ch] [ch]E5[/ch]
Looking for America, crawling through your schools[/tab]

Don't you remember ...

Chorus (Same as before)

Marconi plays the Mamba,
Listen to the radio -
Don't you remember?
We built this city, 
We built this city on rock and roll
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll
  
We built, we built this city yeah
[tab]      [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]
We built this city [/tab]
We built, we built this city
(Repeat x5 - fadeing out)
